title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mphasis Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mphasis Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Mphasis Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mphasis Digital Technologies:
Mphasis Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis Digital Technologies!
